name: mcp-issue-loop
description: Work through GitHub issues labelled ready-for-ai in an Umbraco MCP repo, driving each to a CI-green PR. Also bundles rework-loop, which reacts to the GitHub PR-review event: when a reviewer requests changes on a loop-authored PR it addresses the feedback, re-greens CI, and re-requests review (never merges — merge-flow does). CI is the test gate, so the cloud path needs no local Umbraco. Repo-agnostic; runs locally (worktrees + parallel subagents + local tests) or as a cloud routine.
